events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still got the moves! Happy birthday to the legendary Sir Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV, Music Television, launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Music TV Revolution
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV arrived and changed music forever. Remember the first video they played?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis' seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on August 29, 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop history.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Still sounds as fresh as '94. Celebrating the lasting impact of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining moment of 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music. The spirit of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who left us on this day in 1977. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations.

events.title: Anniversary of the shooting of Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Remembering the tragic events surrounding Tupac Shakur, who was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died six days later on September 13.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty years ago, the music world lost a true icon. Remembering the enduring impact of Tupac Shakur.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar God Remembered
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, who left us far too soon on this day in 1970.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring timeless tracks and that legendary cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: The Fab Four's 'Abbey Road' dropped on this day in '69, giving us some of their most unforgettable songs. What's your favourite from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable lead singer of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking as hard as ever.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and a true rock 'n' roll star, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite Oasis track?

events.title: Anniversary of John Lennon's 'Imagine' single
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message that still resonates today.

events.title: Anniversary of the first Apple iPod's unveiling
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the revolutionary first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple changed how we listen to music forever with the unveiling of the first iPod. Remember yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating over 60 years of 007. What's your favourite Bond film or theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles' co-founder and peace activist John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the enduring spirit and music of John Lennon.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, co-founder of Monty Python, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty, a true comedic genius.
